title: Run
description: A row from the durable runs table. Returned by GET /v1/runs and GET /v1/runs/{id} (with on-disk manifest details merged in).

trace_id.description: Alias for run_id; preserved for legacy callers.

state.description: Lifecycle state. `orphaned` = the row was running when a prior aitelier process exited; Sandbox Agent has no resume API yet, so it's terminal.

agent_id.description: Agent backend name (claude, codex, ...) when kind=agent.

parent_run_id.description: Optional pointer to a parent run for multi-agent workflows. Pure pass-through: aitelier records it and lets consumers query `/v1/runs?parent_run_id=X`, but enforces no semantics (no FK, no cycle check, no cascade). Orchestrators above aitelier own the meaning.

sandbox_backend.description: `local` if the SA URL is loopback, `remote` otherwise. Stamped at agent-call time.

sandbox_server_id.description: ACP server_id this run was bound to. Future SA session-resume APIs can adopt it.

environment.description: Snapshot of mcp_servers + tool_allowlist at run time.

system_prompt_hash.description: SHA-256 of the system prompt actually sent to the provider; lets dashboards group runs by prompt variant.

result.description: Final result payload from the run. For LLM/embed kinds: the OpenAI-shape response body. For agent kinds: the aggregated done event (content, finish_reason, usage, tool_calls). Empty object if the run hasn't reached a terminal state.
